description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a flat, smooth surface and a natural wood grain pattern. The tabletop is supported by four angled legs, each made of the same wood material, with dark metal or painted accents where the legs meet the tabletop. The design is minimalist and modern, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or hardware. The table appears sturdy and functional, suitable for communal or work-related activities in urban environments. Its proportions suggest it could serve as a coffee table or a low meeting table. The finish is matte, highlighting the natural texture and color variations of the wood.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden table with angled legs and a smooth, natural wood grain finish. Minimalist design with dark accent details at the leg joints.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and two angled legs with dark accents.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow edge of the tabletop and the alignment of the two legs beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the tabletop and two angled legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the tabletop edge and two supporting legs visible.
